CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(Image_URL__c), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.force.com/s/library-item/"+ Id , IMAGE(Image_URL__c + $Organization.Id , "",(VALUE(LEFT(Image_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c) - 1))*0.5),(VALUE(RIGHT(Image_Ratio__c, LEN(Image_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c))))*0.5) ,"_self" ), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.force.com/s/library-item/"+ Id ,IMAGE("https://fimby.file.force.com/sfc/dist/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_PNG&versionId=068OL000009lQ6k&operationContext=DELIVERY&contentId=05TOL00000CRQbx&page=0&d=/a/OL000005fMmU/x1LoxtMryt9QgofjTw8JVZhEV9qyTuuS0v11plvEYcg&oid=00D5f000006NDkr", "" , 100,100),"_self" ))
CustomField.label: Image
